sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi stub od stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of the pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: شَبَّهَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسَ بِنَهْرٍ جَارٍ يَمْسَحُ الْخَطَايَا [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ مَوَاقِيتِ الصَّلَاةِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je uporedio pet dnevnih namaza sa tekućom rijekom koja briše grijehe [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o namaskim vremenima].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) likened the five daily prayers to a running river that wipes away sins [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Times of Prayer].

sentences.arabic: مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ وَصَلَّى، غَسَلَ اللَّهُ ذُنُوبَهُ كَمَا يَغْسِلُ الْمَاءُ الْوَسَخَ.
sentences.translation: Ko uzme abdest i klanja, Allah mu briše grijehe kao što voda spira prljavštinu.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever performs ablution and prays, Allah washes away his sins just as water washes away dirt.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الصَّلَاةُ الْمُسْلِمَ عَلَى الرَّاحَةِ وَالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz pomaže muslimanu da pronađe odmor i duševni smiraj.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer helps the Muslim to find rest and psychological tranquility.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ يُحَافِظُ الْمُؤْمِنُ الصَّادِقُ عَلَى صَلَاتِهِ فِي وَقْتِهَا الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Zato iskreni vjernik čuva svoj namaz u njegovom određenom vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, the sincere believer maintains his prayer at its specified time.
